query:
DELETE FROM follow_ups
WHERE id NOT IN (
  SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT MIN(id) 
    FROM follow_ups
    WHERE status = 'pendente'
    GROUP BY leadId, corretorId, DATE(dataFollowUp)
  ) AS keep_ids
)
AND status = 'pendente'
AND leadId IN (
  SELECT leadId 
  FROM follow_ups 
  WHERE status = 'pendente'
  GROUP BY leadId, corretorId, DATE(dataFollowUp)
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute DELETE FROM follow_ups
WHERE id NOT IN (
  SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT MIN(id) 
    FROM follow_ups
    WHERE status = 'pendente'
    GROUP BY leadId, corretorId, DATE(dataFollowUp)
  ) AS keep_ids
)
AND status = 'pendente'
AND leadId IN (
  SELECT leadId 
  FROM follow_ups 
  WHERE status = 'pendente'
  GROUP BY leadId, corretorId, DATE(dataFollowUp)
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
);
